feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAC Story date Issue
entry.content:
Hi All

In our Sac Story Implementation,  we are using input control where we select Month( Oct-2024)

In Report Table :  in 1st column we need default data for Jan-2024 as per my input selection date(oct-2024)  I highlighted in yellow  , we need your help 

Based on Input control date selection (Oct-2024) we are able to display data, highlighted in Red 

Below image for Ref

 

 

Can someone  help its urgent

entry.title: DATA([d/Measures] = "Amount", [d/gl_account] = "RevToVolumsap analytics cloud advanced formula issue
entry.content:
Hi 

Sorry , by mistake I deleted script, reposting the same. Here Third data point not getting calculated. 

DATA([d/Measures] = "Amount", [d/gl_account] = "RevToVolume", [d/data_src] = "calc") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/data_src] = "Input", [d/gl_account] = "RevToVolume", [d/product_grp] = "#", [d/product] = "#", [d/profit_center] = "#", [d/posting_month] = "000000")
DATA([d/Measures] = "Amount", [d/gl_account] = "TPV", [d/data_src] = "calc") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/gl_account]="TPV",[d/data_src]= "fba")
DATA([d/Measures] = "Amount", [d/gl_account] = "TTR_STAT", [d/data_src] = "calc") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="Amount", [d/gl_account]="TPV",[d/data_src]= "calc") * RESULTLOOKUP( [d/Measures]="Amount", [d/gl_account] = "RevToVolume", [d/data_src] = "calc")

 

Regards

Mahesh

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud compatibility with SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Is there any feature support matrix for SAP Analytics Cloud functionality for Datasphere (direct consume for analytics model)?

We have done few testing and found that nice feature such Compass, Predictive Scenario, In chart time series forecast and smart insight is not working.

Thanks for all help.

entry.title: is Linked Analysis is possible for Time series chart ?
entry.content: is Linked Analysis is possible for Time series chart?

entry.title: Change Story filter programmatically
entry.content:
I everyone,

I am new in SAP Analytics Cloud BTW, I am using a story filter (at the left of the story) called HistoryType as  you can see from the screenshot:

I also created a listbox and I would like to change the filter as soon as I select something from the list. Is it possible to do that or I should use something else?

entry.title: How to import currency conversion data from SAP BW/4 to SAC?
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

I am trying to import the currency conversion data from SAP BW/4 to SAC currency conversion table.

I came across the documentation bellow and followed the steps until step 7 where I got a blocker.

Import Currency Conversion Data | SAP Help Portal

  • First I have created the conversion table in SAC
  • After I have chosen the option to Import Data from Data Source

  • Selected the data source SAP BW (including BW/4HANA)

 

  • Next I have selected the Target Currency Conversion Table, the Connection and "Create a new query" option

  • Although on the following step, the "Next" button is blurred which makes me think something is missing, but I am not sure what exactly

 

Can someone please advise if something was missed?

Or is there a better practice to import currency conversion data from SAP BW/4 to SAC currency conversion table?

 

Many thanks in advance!

AA

entry.title: Coding for a "new product" button SAC
entry.content:
Hi, 

In my sales planning story, I want to create a "new product" button, that will open a window and let the user fill data.

I'm not sure how to do it - do you have a similar example to share?

thank you!

entry.title: How do we put the usage overview table in SAC dashboard
entry.content:
Hi,

The requirement is to put a detailed table of system overview as in who has logged in or currently using in a sac dashboard. 

The exception is user has access only as BI Content viewer - how do we do it?

entry.title: SAC story date selection as static
entry.content:
Hi All,

Created story in optimized Responsive page .

Added Input filer where i can see Date hier as  shared image below . Now we need as  static selection  like 2003-Jan

Multi selection option to disable can some one help

entry.title: Fetch Rate Version Data from Currency Table to Story
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We want to create an Input Control on Rate Version (From Currency table ) in an optimized story in SAC. 

But we are unable to fetch the data from currency table to story level. Kindly suggest solution to achieve this.

Kindly suggest.

Thanks

entry.title: How does Transports move in SAC having N, N+1 Landscape with multiple releases(R1,R2 etc)
entry.content:
Consider we have a development tenant and a production tenant only provisioned due to a client's cost constraints for SAC in BTP, How will the transports be moved/tested from the development tenant to production tenant considering the fact that there could be multiple releases and there needs to be a differentiation between transports of Production Support Landscape and Maintenance(Project) Landscape.

 

Thanks,

Pavan.

entry.title: How to copy data from parent node to child node via data action?
entry.content:
Hi,

Here is the scenario. There is parent child hierarchy in the profit center dimension. I have data at node level. I want to copy the data from node level to specific child level only. For ex. Under 'H1' node, there are four child nodes: 'A', 'B, 'C', 'D'. I want the data to be copied to 'A', 'C' and 'D' only. I created a property in profit center dimension as Parent and maintained the values as 'H1' for 'A', 'C' and 'D' but it was not working as expected.

Anyone who has faced this similar issue or knows the workaround in this case. Their comments would be deeply appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: SAC Automatic Datalocks workflows
entry.content:
Hello, 

i'm trying to make a dat alock run automatically but is still asking for permission but I don't know what we are doing wrong. 

The person that is owner of the data lock task is also assignee and is the owner of the locks inside of the model but the task is asking for permission to run. Why is this sitll happening? Here are some pictures: 

Datalock cancel because it haven't been approved 

Owner of the datalock in the dimension geography and in the dimmension audit trail. "Diego Moratilla"

Owner and asignee of the task.

Thank you so much for your help

entry.title: Date Difference is giving validation error in SAP Analytic cloud data action
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

I am getting invalid date format error. Created Disposal Date as attribute (Text -Data type) in Asset Dimension.

Date format: YYYYMM in StartDate Attribute in Asset Dimension

Date Dimension: YYYYMM

 
MEMBERSET [d/CALMONTH] =[d/Version].[p/START_DATE] TO [d/Version].[p/END_DATE]
MEMBERSET [d/MEASURE]="DEPRECIATION"
MEMBERSET [d/ASSET].[p/START_DATE] != " "
 
DELETE()
FOREACH [d/CALMONTH]
IF DATEDIFF([d/CALMONTH],[d/ASSET].[p/START_DATE],"MONTH")>=0 THEN
DATA()=RESULTLOOKUP([d/CALMONTH]=PREVIOUS(1,"MONTH",[d/Version].[p/START_DATE]),[d/Version]="public.Actual")
ENDIF
ENDFOR

With Regards,

Brahma Kolli

entry.title: SAC model calulcation formula editor poping up problem
entry.content:
hi all, 

for a time now, i'm unable to edit formulas becuase the helper text keeps poping in and out, 

see attached gif.

i tried clearing cache and cookies, usally i use EDGE but also tried google chrome. no luck

entry.title: SAC connection with SAP on premise HR system
entry.content:
Dear support,

We would like to create the connection from SAC to SAP HR on-premise.
Does SAC support this type of connection? If so, is a special connector needed? Can you help me with the installation? 

BR
Maria

entry.title: Calculation Contexts MIN Medium Max
entry.content:
Dear All , 

 

Please see the screen shot 

 

How to show in WEBI only the dates in yelow 

 

I try with running max but it does not work .. with max only the max ,with min the minimun but the medium

 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: How to consume CDS with parameter in SAC on top of import connection from S/4HANA on-premise.
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

We are tried to consume the CDS with parameter in SAC it is showing "unexpected program error ", when we can pull the CDS without parameter  I can able to build model in SAC.
Can anyone please help us with any solution or workaround, I tried to write freehand query but unable to proceed. If freehand query help us to consume CDS with parameter ,Please suggest how to write.

Thanks in Advance,

Regards,
Sowmiya

entry.title: How to create RKF (Restricted key Figure) In SAC Add-in for Excel
entry.content:
Hello,

I have some RKF's In my story but unable to access in SAC Add-in for Excel.

How to access existing RKF's from story or how to create RKF's in SAC Add-in for Excel.

Regards,

Vasu

entry.title: Calculate the totals of measures - Sap Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

In the CDS view source of my SAC report I had to set the MAX aggregation for the measures.
But now I can't (rightly) display the totals... if I enable the display of totals (first row of table) in the table it gives me the MAX values.
How can I manage it?

I attach an example screen

Thanks

 

Best Regards
